subject: [PATCH 3/6] fs/proc: use softleaf_has_pfn() in pagemap PMD walker

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the pagemap PMD walker by adding a check to ensure that only non-present PMDs that encode a PFN are looked up using softleaf_to_page(). This prevents crashes when encountering non-present PMDs of other types, such as upcoming PMD-level swap entries. The fix is achieved by introducing a guard with softleaf_has_pfn(), matching the existing handling for non-present PTEs in pte_to_pagemap_entry().
